profile.name: Surya Pundir
profile.title: S-Rank UI/UX Designer
profile.tagline: Designing with the precision of a Shadow Monarch.
profile.bio: A first-year design student exploring the line between system and story. Every interface is a dungeon — every dungeon a chance to level up.
profile.personalTouch: Off-screen I sketch monsters in the margins of my notebooks, replay Solo Leveling for the third time, and chase good chai across Dehradun.
profile.goals: Become a designer who builds calm, systemic interfaces; ship a shipped product before the end of first year; mentor a junior by the time I graduate.
